1.content:
At the office of Dunder Mifflin, Micheal was working. Micheal called pam to his office. Pam came in and asked “Watsup Micheal what did you need”. Micheal replied “I need you to ummm... get me a report on this girl from Vance refrigeration.” “Micheal I will not do that, it’s not in my job description”
Said Pam. Micheal said “Ok but you’re a hot mistress that can stick her boobs out to get her to meet me”. “Sorry Micheal but I won’t do that for you.” “Ok but forward those emails to Jim”. She left his office and the scene cut to Jim and Dwight. Jim had pranked Dwight by putting his battle star galactica model on the receptionist’s desk. Dwight got up and was pranked because his shoes were tied together. He tripped and fell to the ground. Jim had crossed the line and Dwight Jumped at him and unplugged his computer. This caused a power surge and everyone in the office got swapped. Everyone swapped bodies and Micheal swapped with...


Choose the employee that should swap
1.title: Choose your Charecter to Swap

11.content: Choose who Micheal will swap with
11.title: Micheal’s change of body

111.content: Everyone in the Dunder Mifflin woke up around the same time. Micheal woke up passed out in the receptionist chair. He was groggy and feeling a bad headache. “Mann I must’ve spent another crazy night with Jan” he sighed. He heard a lighter voice come from his mouth. He touched his throuagh and it felt different. The motion from the jerk of his arm made a stray part of reddish brown hair fell in front of his eye. Micheal grabbed it and it hurt. As if it was his own hair. He grabbed his head and found locks of the same hair in his face. He knew that Pam kept a small hand mirror on his desk. He picked up the mirror and saw that he had pale feminine hands. He opened up the bright pink mirror and saw that he had Pams face. He touched his cheek and his face. “What in the freaking Office is going on here”. He had pams body.
111.title: Micheals body

choices: Micheal goes and talks with Pam
1111.content: Micheal yelled out in Pam’s voice around the time everyone was figuring out about the swap. Erin hopped up and tried running to Pam but she fell and tripped because of her heels. Angela got up to comfort her. “Ohh Erin are you ok, do you need anything” in a calm and caring voice that was unusual of her. Everyone erupted into chaos and started confronting the bodies that they swapped with.
1111.title: Micheal gets settled in

choices: Send people home to work out the Swap
11111.content:
This is my list of swaps (more may come into my mind later if I add or think of more characters)
Micheal - Pam
Jim - Erin
Dwight - Stanley
Angela - Phyllis
Oscar - Meredith
Kevin - Creed
Micheal went up to her old body in his office but she struggled in Pam’s office skirt and heels. She was slowly watching his steps as she went to his Office. She went in and saw her body freaking out. “Why are you in my body. Why am I Micheal. What is happening” Pam freaked. “Calm down there is a group of people freaking out over there and we need to comfort and get things to normal” Micheal said. “This is not normal. It’s too much to handle right now” Pam replied.
“That’s what she said or should I say, that’s what I said” Micheal laughed. “Do not say that in my body with my mouth in my clothes”. He told Micheal to sit down and she sat in the chair. It felt foreign sitting down with Pam’s baggage and she spread her legs. Pam was not happy with this and sternly told her “do not sit like that. Sit like a woman” “Ok I will but everyone is freaking out in there and we need to do something”. Pam reluctantly agreed and they went into the main room.

Micheal took off Pam’s heels and told him “Jesus Pam how do you walk in these”. “I don’t know it’s easy at this point”. She went in and stood on a chair “Everyone calm down” Micheal yelled. He started a sentence “I know this is odd and strange seeing me carrying Pam’s baggage but I am Micheal and I am calling a conference meeting right now. Everyone organized into the conference room as Micheal started his speech.
11111.title: Micheal Calls a Conference

111111.content:
“Ok people we need to do our best to work this situation out” Micheal said. “And how exactly do we do that” Kevin said. “Clearly we are the only people who were swapped so we should all go home and adjust to these swaps” Dwight said. “For once Dwight has a logical idea” Jim said. “Ok then group up and figure this out but do not tell any family or friends” Micheal said. Everyone hopped in their cars and went to the others house.
Micheal grabbed his stuff from his office as Micheal met up with Pam who was carrying a purse. “Oh god Pam, that went better than expected”. “I still don’t want to be in your body” “Ok Pam do you think I love standing here in a skirt and heels, we just need to calm down”. They were in the parking lot eventually.
111111.title: Send people home to work out the Swap

info.brief_description: The characters of NBC’s “The Office” swap bodies and go through changes.
